ValidationRule.description: The Payee on the Invoice should be the Lessor on the Lease, and the Payor should be the Lessee
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c), leaseworks__Lease__r.RecordType.DeveloperName != 'Non_Lease_Agreement', NOT(ISNEW()),
OR( AND( ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Rent_Payable_Frm__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rent_Payable_Frm__c)), leaseworks__Rent_Payable_Frm__c != leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessee_New__c ), AND( ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Rent_Pyable_To__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rent_Pyable_To__c)), leaseworks__Rent_Pyable_To__c != leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Manually updating the payor/payee field to values that are different to those on the related contract is not allowed. Please ensure that the lessee/lessor information in the contract is correct and select the corresponding payor/payee.
